titleStmt.title: SII 6.184: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 184. (A.R. No. 222 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇīyyavakṣuṁḍu vaśīkrṛtalōkuṁḍu vipravaṁśanistāraṇakāraṇuṁḍu vilasadguṇabhūṣaṇuṁḍiṣṭa
janarakṣāratuṁ ḍuttamōttamuṁḍu gauśikagōtruṁḍu gommaśauridha¨rmmārucaritruṁ ḍapperuvaṁgūri pu
rīśuṁḍu dhanyuṁḍu[nnatini .] Āvasudhāmarēśvaruna kanvaya ratnamukōmmamāṁbakunu bhūvinutuṁḍu vipraku
labhūṣaṇuṁḍudbhavamayye goṁkkadhātrīvibhu saṁdhdhivigrahiyatisthiracittuṁ ḍamātyaratnamāgōviṁdanavaṁśava¨rddhanuṁ
ḍu gōtrapavitruṁḍu dhātruṁḍitrayini . gurunibhuṁḍayya mātyanidhigoydana peggaḍakaṁbujāsya yaṁburuhadalākṣigē
tamakuṁ butruṁḍu gauśikagōtruṁḍaṁbujōdarapadabhaktiyuktuṁḍu pratāpadinēśuṁḍu goṁkkadhāruṇīśvarunaku sandhivigrahivrasanna mana
skuṁḍu gommaṁḍimmahini . ramaṇīyyadhanadapuravaramamaraṁga nijarājadhāni yayyuṁḍḍaṁganakaramu nellūrunu lōpugaṁgrama monaraṁgganēle bāhuga
¨rvvamu velayanu . vananidhiparivritamādiṁgalayanagha śivālayamulenniyo ṁcana kalaśaṁbulu veṭṭina yinanibhuṁḍagu goṁkkadhāraṇīśvaru cētanuThe inscription is left incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 6.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
